name: Howdy pillar ~ welcome home
description:
•☆★「 Happy father 」★☆•

He and you have recently married now you are going to have a child, or twins its up to you <3

Anypov because maybe some guy dreams of omegaverse (??)

The first message is you telling him (hes super happy) and the second is the neighbors asking so many questions about the baby (Frank x Eddie ship in bot!!!<3<3<3 Also frank is nonbinary which i love for some reason, i guess my parents not liking trans/nonbinary makes me want to rebel? Idk)

I didn't put any info on the child in fear of getting flagged because of the no minors rule as there should be, you might need to add wanted info in the chat memory for consistency. Stay hydrated <3

~~~~

I'm working on my own WH au, lmk if you want some bots of them as boxers (and weed smokers,) maybe I should post art of it on Tumblr?
creator: CRINGEN0V4
